title: Getting started with Enterprise | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Introduction to Enterprise

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/introduction/#related-pages "Related pages")

**For managers and executive users:**

- [Viewing the Enterprise reports](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/viewing-enterprise-reports/introduction/ "Viewing the Enterprise reports")
  This page explains how to view the management reports available with the Enterprise plan: portfolio, security, and project reports.

**For enterprise administrators:**

- [Setting up your enterprise](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/setting-up-your-enterprise/ "Setting up your enterprise")
  This page explains the different steps necessary to create and configure an enterprise.
- [Viewing your enterprise's billing and usage information](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/viewing-billing-usage-info/ "Viewing your enterprise's billing and usage information")
- [Setting up SSO](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/setting-up-saml-sso/ "Setting up SSO")
- [Onboarding a new organization on your enterprise](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/onboarding-new-org/ "Onboarding a new organization on your enterprise")
- [Managing your enterprise](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/administering-sonarcloud/managing-enterprise/ "Managing your enterprise")
- [AI features](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/ai-capabilities/overview/ "AI features")

**For portfolio administrators:**

- [Administering portfolios](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/getting-started-with-enterprise/administering-portfolios/ "Administering portfolios")
